backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for a wedding invitation platform, with data types and CRUD operations for invitations, events, RSVPs, photos, and background music stored in in-memory maps.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented feature IDs to their titles, affected source files, component dependencies, and test IDs for tracking build evidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON dictionary of short one-sentence descriptions for each frontend source file, serving as a reference summary of every page and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for the landing page, dashboard, invitation editor, creation wizard, and guest invitation view, plus a global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/RSVPRe: Modal dialog that fetches and displays all RSVP responses for a given invitation, showing a stats summary (total responses, confirmed guests, declined) and a scrollable list of individual guest entries with attending badges and formatted dates.
frontend/src/components/events/EventCard: Displays a single event's details (title, date, time, venue, description) in a styled card with edit and delete action buttons, using event-type-specific theming.
frontend/src/components/events/EventForm: A form component for creating or editing a local event, with fields for event type, title, date, time, venue, and description, plus save/cancel actions.
frontend/src/components/guest/CountdownT: Renders a live countdown timer to the wedding date/time, updating every second and styled according to the invitation's selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/CoupleIntr: Displays the invitation message and family details section of the guest view, with scroll-triggered fade-in animation and template-based styling.
frontend/src/components/guest/EventTimel: Renders a chronologically sorted list of wedding events as styled cards with scroll animations, each showing event type, date, time, venue, and description.
frontend/src/components/guest/HeroSectio: Full-screen hero section for the guest invitation view, displaying the couple's names, wedding date, venue, optional photo, and a parallax background with template-driven styling.
frontend/src/components/guest/PhotoGalle: Displays a responsive photo gallery grid with scroll animations and a fullscreen lightbox modal supporting previous/next navigation for wedding invitation photos.
frontend/src/components/guest/RSVPForm.t: Renders an RSVP form for wedding guests to submit attendance, guest count, and a message, showing a confirmation screen on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/guest/VenueSecti: Displays the wedding venue name, address, and an optional Google Maps link button, styled according to the invitation's selected template.
frontend/src/components/guest/WhatsAppSh: A fixed floating button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp share link for the wedding invitation URL.
frontend/src/components/layout/Decorativ: Renders a decorative divider in one of three variants (mandala image, line, or flourish image) with SVG fallback if images fail to load.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: A fixed site header with scroll-aware styling, logo, desktop navigation links, a 'Create Invitation' button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicContr: A floating music player widget with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that attempts autoplay on mount and gracefully handles mobile autoplay restrictions.
frontend/src/components/media/MusicUploa: A React component that allows users to upload background music (MP3/WAV/M4A) for an invitation, with play/pause preview and an auto-play toggle stored in the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/media/PhotoGalle: A drag-and-drop photo gallery uploader that reads multiple image files as data URLs and stores them in the invitation form context, with a grid display and per-photo delete functionality.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonLoader.t: Reusable skeleton loading component supporting four variants (card, text, image, invitation-card) that renders shimmer placeholder elements while content loads.
frontend/src/components/templates/ColorS: A grid-based color scheme selector that displays color swatches from predefined schemes and highlights the currently selected scheme with a gold checkmark.
frontend/src/components/templates/FontSe: A grid-based font pairing selector that previews each font option with a sample heading and marks the selected font with a gold checkmark.
frontend/src/components/templates/Templa: A scaled invitation preview component that renders couple photo, names, date, venue, and events using the selected template's colors and fonts in a 9:16 aspect ratio card.
A template selection UI that groups available templates by category (Royal Indian, Modern Minimal, Cinematic Dark) and renders each as a styled card with a simulated preview and selection indicator.
frontend/src/components/wizard/CoupleDet: A wizard step component for entering couple details including a drag-and-drop couple photo upload and input fields for bride and groom names, backed by the invitation form context.
frontend/src/components/wizard/EventMana: Wizard step component for managing wedding events, supporting add, edit, delete, and sorted display of events using EventCard and EventForm components.
frontend/src/components/wizard/MediaMana: Wizard step component that renders photo gallery upload and background music uploader sections for the invitation.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ProgressB: Displays a multi-step progress bar with labeled step circles, showing completed, active, and pending states with an animated connecting line.
frontend/src/components/wizard/ReviewSte: Final wizard step that lets users set a unique URL slug and review a summary of couple details, events, and other invitation data before publishing.
frontend/src/components/wizard/TemplateT: Wizard step for selecting and customizing the invitation template, color scheme, font, and background style, with a live preview panel.
frontend/src/context/InvitationFormConte: React context providing shared form state and updater for the multi-step invitation creation wizard, including couple details, events, template, and media fields.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend operations including CRUD for invitations, events, photos, RSVPs, and background music using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Exports two hooks: `useScrollAnimation` for triggering visibility state via IntersectionObserver, and `useLazyLoad` for lazy-loading images when they enter the viewport.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with a luxury wedding color palette (gold, ivory, blush, crimson) in CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, and defines utility component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvitationWizar: Multi-step wizard page for creating a wedding invitation, handling form validation per step and sequentially submitting invitation data, events, photos, and background music to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying all user invitations as cards with actions to edit, preview, publish, delete, and view RSVP responses, using skeleton loading and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/GuestInvitation.tsx: Public guest-facing invitation page that fetches and renders a published invitation by slug, composing sections like hero, countdown, events, photo gallery, venue, and RSVP form using the selected template's styling.
frontend/src/pages/InvitationEditor.tsx: Full-page invitation editor with tabbed wizard steps (couple details, events, template, media), save/publish actions, a publish-success modal with copy/WhatsApp sharing, and an RSVP responses modal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page showcasing app features, sample invitation previews, and a hero section with parallax scrolling, linking to sign-up and dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/NotFound.tsx: 404 error page with a decorative heart icon and buttons to navigate back to the home page or dashboard.
frontend/src/utils/animations.ts: Exports reusable animation constants and helper functions (duration, easing, fadeIn, slideUp, scaleIn, stagger) for use across components.
frontend/src/utils/eventIcons.tsx: Defines icon, color, and style configurations for each wedding event type (Haldi, Mehndi, Sangeet, Wedding, Reception, Custom) and exports a lookup helper.
frontend/src/utils/templateDefinitions.t: Defines the six invitation template configurations (fonts, colors, gradients, backgrounds) and color scheme options available in the template picker.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a luxury color palette (gold, crimson, ivory, blush), custom fonts (Cinzel, Cormorant, Playfair), and shadow/radius tokens.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 7) for an AI-powered Indian Wedding Invitation SaaS platform, including architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing features with their IDs and requirements.
